goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the 'centre' and should be in the type of 'college'.
Make sure you get 'postcode', 'entrance fee', and 'address'.
You are also looking for a 'train'. The train should leave on 'monday' and should depart from 'london liverpool street'.
The train should go to 'cambridge' and should 'leave after 08:45'.
Make sure you get 'train ID'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the centre and should be in the type of college
Make sure you get postcode, entrance fee, and address
You are also looking for a train. The train should leave on monday and should depart from london liverpool street
The train should go to cambridge and should leave after 08:45
Make sure you get train ID
